violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

The door to the outside, located in the retail area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the cabinet under the soda machine have an accumulation of old wood dust and old rodent droppings. PIC cleaned and sanitized during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
Hand-washing sink near the ice maker/3 bay sink area was observed in poor repair (no running water). New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
Inspector observed food package with rodent gnaw marks. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of discolored debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

The door to the outside, located in the retail area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings, urine, and nesting material. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the retail shelves and cabinet under soda machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, droppings and/or other debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

The following areas were observed in poor repair: -missing/broken ceiling tiles near 3 bay sink and walk-in cooler door. -exposed insulation under basement stairs. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

The floors under retail shelves and basement area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

Food contact surfaces of (ice machine) were observed with black and brown residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took unit out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023

The front door to the outside, located in the retail area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023
Single service items were stored on the floor in the basement. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023
Walk-in freezer door gaskets were observed in poor repair. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023

The floor in the walk-in cooler has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023
